forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny day. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the southwest. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

The chance of morning fog. Patches of morning frost in the west. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Mostly sunny. Patches of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Areas of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog west of Nullarbor in the late morning. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost in the south. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog south of Coober Pedy in the late morning. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. The chance of morning frost south of Woomera. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Yunta in the morning. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
